title: Lodha Group Digital Technologies is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Lodha Group Digital Technologies is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha Group Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha Group Digital Technologies:
Lodha Group Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group Digital Technologies!
